name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

A quick look at what came through the practice yesterday — a few new patients reached out, some appointments were booked, and the schedule is shaping up nicely. Nothing that needs to pull you away from your first coffee.

If anything needs a gentle follow-up, it's already queued up in the dashboard. Otherwise, you're set for a smooth day of smiles.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
